mapper.sql: c.id, c.circle_id, c.user_id, c.content, c.parent_id, c.reply_to_user_id, c.create_time, c.update_time, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment_like cl WHERE cl.comment_id = c.id) AS like_count
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment (circle_id, user_id, content, parent_id, reply_to_user_id, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{circleId}, #{userId}, #{content}, #{parentId}, #{replyToUserId}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT , u.name, u.avatar, ru.name AS reply_to_user_name FROM comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN user ru ON c.reply_to_user_id = ru.id WHERE c.id = #{id}

SELECT , u.name, u.avatar, ru.name AS reply_to_user_name FROM comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN user ru ON c.reply_to_user_id = ru.id WHERE c.circle_id = #{circleId} ORDER BY c.create_time ASC

SELECT , u.name, u.avatar, ru.name AS reply_to_user_name FROM comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN user ru ON c.reply_to_user_id = ru.id WHERE c.parent_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY c.create_time ASC
